final:
module top_module(
   input clk,
   input toggle,
   input [31:0] cyc,
   output reg out
   );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
      if (toggle && cyc == 5) begin
         out <= 1;
         $display("*COVER: Cyc==5");
      end
      else begin
         out <= 0;
      end
   end

endmodule
